tldr_zh: 歐盟強制Google開放AI和搜尋數據，OpenAI推強化學習紅隊模型抵禦攻擊，美伊衝突升溫。
tldr_en: EU forces Google to open AI and search data; OpenAI's red team model blocks 99.95% of prompt injection attacks; US-Iran conflict escalates.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推GPT-Red紅隊模型，提示注入攻擊防禦率達99.95%
items.title_en: OpenAI's GPT-Red Red Team Model Achieves 99.95% Defense Rate Against Prompt Injection
items.summary_zh: OpenAI運用內部安全紅隊模型GPT-Red，通過自我對戰強化學習自動產生提示注入攻擊，找出產品模型弱點並納入訓練。GPT-5.6 Sol對直接提示注入的攻擊成功率僅0.05%，是該公司目前抵抗提示注入能力最強的產品模型。
items.summary_en: OpenAI uses its internal GPT-Red security red team model to automatically generate prompt injection attacks through self-play reinforcement learning, identifying and strengthening vulnerabilities. GPT-5.6 Sol achieves only 0.05% success rate for direct prompt injection attacks, the company's strongest defense against this threat.

items.title_zh: OpenAI為青少年推出安全AI使用工具，含家長控制功能
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches Safe AI Access Tools for Teens with Parental Controls
items.summary_zh: OpenAI針對青少年推出ChatGPT安全使用方案，包含年齡適配保護、學習工具、家長控制及專家合作等功能。該舉措旨在讓年輕使用者能安全受益於AI技術。
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT safety measures for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships. The initiative ensures young users can safely benefit from AI technology.

items.title_zh: Google DeepMind發佈生物韌性AI模型研究方案
items.title_en: Google DeepMind Shares Bioresilience AI Approach with Isomorphic Labs
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind與Isomorphic Labs公布聯合生物韌性研究方案及相關AI模型。該合作旨在利用AI技術提升生物系統的抗風險能力。
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs publish joint approach to bioresilience and AI models. The collaboration aims to leverage AI to strengthen biological system resilience.

items.title_zh: 歐盟正式命令Google開放Android AI，分享搜尋數據
items.title_en: EU Officially Orders Google to Open AI on Android and Share Search Data
items.summary_zh: 歐盟根據《數位市場法》強制Google開放Android系統的AI功能，並須與競爭者共享搜尋數據。Google表示此舉可能危害用戶隱私和安全，但歐盟認為這是確保市場公平競爭的必要措施。
items.summary_en: The EU mandates Google to open AI features on Android and share search data with competitors under the Digital Markets Act. Google warns this could endanger user privacy, while the EU argues it's necessary for fair market competition.

items.title_zh: Netflix近300部作品使用生成式AI，主要用於後期製作
items.title_en: Netflix Reports ~300 Titles Using Generative AI in Production
items.summary_zh: Netflix在第二季財報中揭露，約300部平台作品使用了生成式AI，多數應用於後期製作階段。Netflix表示正持續增加AI工具使用，以提高輸出品質、加快製作速度並降低成本。
items.summary_en: Netflix discloses that approximately 300 titles on its platform utilized generative AI, mostly in post-production. The company states it increasingly leverages these tools to deliver higher quality output faster and at lower cost.

items.title_zh: Google Vids新增AI虛擬化身功能，用戶可製作個人化影片
items.title_en: Google Vids Adds AI Avatar Feature for Personalized Video Creation
items.summary_zh: Google為Vids平台新增個人化AI虛擬化身功能，用戶可製作以自己數位分身主演的影片。結合Gemini Omni等生成編輯工具，用戶可通過文字提示和參考圖像快速生成和編輯影片。
items.summary_en: Google adds personalized AI avatars to Vids, allowing users to create videos starring a digital version of themselves. Combined with Gemini Omni-powered generation and editing tools, users can quickly produce videos from text prompts.

items.title_zh: Roblox推出AI遊戲創作功能，文字提示即可生成基礎遊戲
items.title_en: Roblox Launches AI-Powered Game Creation Tool in Mobile App
items.summary_zh: Roblox於行動應用中推出新的「Build」功能，用戶只需輸入單一文字提示即可生成基礎遊戲。此功能大幅降低遊戲開發門檻，使非開發者用戶也能輕鬆創作。
items.summary_en: Roblox launches new "Build" feature in mobile app enabling users to generate basic games from a single text prompt. The tool significantly lowers barriers to game creation for non-developers.

items.title_zh: Epic Games在Fortnite推出36個AI虛擬人物供創作者使用
items.title_en: Epic Games Introduces 36 AI-Powered NPCs for Fortnite Creators
items.summary_zh: Epic Games為Fortnite創作者推出36個具有一致聲音和人設的AI虛擬人物，創作者可於7月30日起用這些角色發布遊戲體驗。此舉有助於豐富遊戲內容創作的多樣性。
items.summary_en: Epic Games provides 36 AI-powered characters with consistent voices and personas for Fortnite creators to use as NPCs starting July 30. This enables richer and more diverse gameplay experiences.

items.title_zh: Uber同意以148億美元收購Delivery Hero，全球業務翻倍
items.title_en: Uber to Acquire Delivery Hero for $14.8B in All-Stock Deal
items.summary_zh: Uber同意以全股票方式收購食品配送平台Delivery Hero，交易金額達148億美元。此收購將使Uber全球業務版圖近乎翻倍，打造除中國外全球規模最大的食品外送平台。
items.summary_en: Uber agrees to acquire Delivery Hero in a $14.8 billion all-stock deal. The transaction will nearly double Uber's global footprint and create one of the world's largest food-delivery platforms outside China.

items.title_zh: 川普白宮傳聲員藉Kalshi預測市場涉內線交易，獲利逾10萬美元
items.title_en: Trump's Teleprompter Operator Accused of $100K Insider Trading on Kalshi
items.summary_zh: 聯邦調查人員認為川普2016年以來的傳聲員Gabriel Perez利用內部信息在Kalshi預測市場進行投注。Perez透過事先掌握川普演講內容，對川普可能發言的內容進行下注，涉嫌獲利超過10萬美元，引發內線交易調查。
items.summary_en: Federal investigators believe Trump's teleprompter operator since 2016, Gabriel Perez, used inside information to bet on Kalshi prediction market regarding Trump's speech content. The operator allegedly profited over $100,000 through insider knowledge, triggering an insider trading investigation.

items.title_zh: Hyundai計畫2028年部署25000台人形機器人，員工罷工反對
items.title_en: Hyundai Workers Strike Against Plan to Deploy 25,000 Atlas Robots by 2028
items.summary_zh: Hyundai計畫自2028年起在美國工廠部署25000台Boston Dynamics的Atlas人形機器人。此舉引發員工關於失業和工作安全的擔憂，導致工廠工人發起罷工行動。
items.summary_en: Hyundai plans to deploy 25,000 Boston Dynamics Atlas humanoid robots starting with US factories in 2028. The plan sparks worker strikes over job security and employment concerns.

items.title_zh: 美軍連續6晚空襲伊朗，擊中機場、橋樑及港口設施
items.title_en: US Launches Six Nights of Airstrikes on Iran, Targeting Airports and Infrastructure
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普下令恢復對伊朗空襲並重啟海上封鎖。美軍6晚連續攻擊伊朗機場、橋樑、火車站及其他設施，造成人員傷亡。伊朗聲稱此舉違反雙方先前達成的停火協議，國際局勢升溫。
items.summary_en: President Trump orders resumption of airstrikes on Iran and naval blockades. US conducts six consecutive nights of strikes targeting airports, bridges, and infrastructure, causing casualties. Iran claims violations of previous ceasefire agreement, escalating international tensions.

items.title_zh: 烏克蘭總統澤連斯基罷免受歡迎國防部長，引發國內抗議
items.title_en: Zelensky's Removal of Popular Defense Minister Sparks Ukrainian Protests
items.summary_zh: 烏克蘭總統澤連斯基罷免深受歡迎的國防部長Fedorov，其與總司令Syrskyi的矛盾據稱是決定的核心原因。此決定引發烏克蘭國內大規模抗議，民眾對其合理性提出質疑。
items.summary_en: President Zelensky removes popular Defense Minister Fedorov, with tensions between Fedorov and Commander-in-Chief Syrskyi cited as the core reason. The decision triggers widespread Ukrainian protests questioning its rationale.
